data.body:
- get rid of the “add” button and “registered” pill
- show the full location of the cli under the Cli name
- replace OpenAI with Codex
- get rid of the stupid lower case text preceding the pull down
- make the pulldown a multi-select and allow selecting any model.  if selected, show the select models to the right where the Add button and registered pill used to be.
- get rid of stupid Add All button.
- use dark green for Add button (like in page header for queued)
- use light green for Scan button (like in Create More button)
data.title: clean up shitty Agents UX
